scope.goal: Repair the second v2180 renderer parity comparison drift after GitHub Actions exposed unnormalized archive and decision digests embedded in the prerequisite-closure-review evidence sentence.
nonGoals: No managed audit connection or runtime execution enablement

parallelProjects.java: recommended parallel; v2182 changes only Node test normalization and does not require Java to wait
parallelProjects.miniKv: recommended parallel; v2182 changes only Node test normalization and does not require mini-kv to wait

ciFailure.rootCause: The v2181 normalizer folded the prerequisite-intake 'chained to <digest>' notes phrase, but the closure-review completed item evidence also rendered two upstream-derived digests in natural language: 'verified archive <digest> for decision <digest>'. Those source digests can differ between Windows CRLF and Linux LF checkout content while preserving the same public renderer structure.

passed.result: 2 test files passed, 3 tests passed; negative census emitted 'Renderer census regression: 14 exceeds --max-unstandardized=13.'

passed.command: npx vitest run test/rendererMigrationV2167Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2168Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2169Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2170Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2175Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2176Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2178Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2179Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2180Parity.test.ts --maxWorkers=2

passed.result: 1 test file passed, 1 test passed under v8 coverage instrumentation; thresholds were set to 0 only because this focused run intentionally does not execute the full suite
2 test files passed, 4 tests passed; v2182 walkthrough counted 3098 Chinese characters and satisfied the current quality gate
passed with 0 errors and 263 existing warnings

safetyBoundary.publicOutput: No public Markdown output was changed. Only normalized test comparison strings changed.
safetyBoundary.testSurface: The normalizer now replaces the closure-review evidence sentence's archive and decision digest values while keeping the sentence, closure state, checks, blockers, section headings, and business text hash-sensitive.
safetyBoundary.stopCondition: If another CI-only drift appears, inspect the exact rendered line and add the narrowest comparison normalizer rule; do not change fixtures or product renderer output to satisfy parity.
